summary: Summary: Speaker1 opens the conversation excited, teasing Speaker2 and enthusiastically recounting the surprise proposal at the pier with flashing lights; Speaker2 listens initially neutral but quickly shifts to surprise, excited, and happiness as the story unfolds. As the dialogue moves into wedding planning, Speaker2 expresses excitement and happiness about details and offers to help organize the event, while Speaker1 remains excited and shares that their parents are involved (noting neutral concerns about unpredictable weather). Speaker1 also expresses excitement and confidence when approving the relationship and advising about finding love, and Speaker2 responds with happiness and approval. The conversation ends with both speakers feeling excited and happiness as they reflect on the special moment and upcoming wedding.
